title: Gashua Heat Wave
lead: A severe heat wave is affecting Gashua with a Z-Score of +3.97. This event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Gashua is causing extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) of 12.9 GG. 
 The relative humidity is very low at 14%, and the wind speed is moderate at 6.6 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Day (HDD) is 0.0 GG, indicating no need for heating, while the CDD is significantly high, indicating a high energy demand for cooling.
conclusion: Activate emergency response protocols to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
